subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-14 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: I want to tell you a remarkable story--the strangest of the strange--so that you may see the great power of the cause of God. When we were exiled from Persia
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @growth of the Cause, @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @Baha'u'llah, @rejection, opposition and persecution
